name: Cranberry Orange Muffins#2
recipeIngredient: 2 Cups cranberry sauce, canned or homemade
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease muffin tins.
3. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except 1/2 cup of orange juice. Mix until blended. Add extra orange juice as needed to obtain a proper batter.
4. Fill muffin tins 2/3 full.
5. Bake for 15-20 minutes.
6. Makes 30 medium or 18 large muffins.
